creator: jszhao@yeah.net
text:
when install ports math/jags, the size of the file classic-bugs.tar.gz downloaded from sourceforge.net is mismatch with the one in math/jags/distinfo, with many message similar with the following:

fetch: http://netcologne.dl.sourceforge.net/project/mcmc-jags/Examples/3.x/classic-bugs.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 81419, actual 83112

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/math/jags
make install clean
